app.name: Mood of the Major
app.footer: Anonymous emotional sharing for university communities.

auth.oauthUnavailable: Social sign-in is not configured. Use email and password instead.
auth.oauthError: Could not sign in with this provider. Please try again.
auth.callbackError: Sign in failed. Please try again.

oauthErrors.oauth_not_configured: Social sign-in is not configured on the server. Use email and password instead.
oauthErrors.oauth_failed: Could not complete sign in with this provider. Check that redirect URIs are configured correctly.
oauthErrors.email_domain_not_allowed: This email domain is not allowed to register on this platform.

register.facultiesLoadError: Could not load faculties. Is the backend running?

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.privacyNote: Your real name is private to your account and is never shown on the public feed.
settings.logoutDescription: Sign out of your account on this device.

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.whatIsTitle: What is Mood of the Major
howToUse.whatIsBody: Mood of the Major is an anonymous social platform for university students. Share how you feel, browse community moods, and explore emotional trends across faculties and majors — without revealing your identity to other students.

howToPostSteps.selectMood: Select a mood category that best matches how you feel.
howToPostSteps.writeMessage: Write your message. You can optionally attach an image.
howToPostSteps.submit: Submit your post. It appears anonymously in the feed.

howToUse.browseBody: Explore the mood feed to read anonymous posts from your campus community.
howToUse.browseReactions: React to posts with emotional reactions to show support or resonance.
howToUse.browseFilters: Use filters to narrow posts by faculty, major, mood category, or date.
howToUse.browseSearch: Search for keywords or topics across posts.
howToUse.privacyAnonymous: Posts, comments, and reactions are anonymous to other users. Your identity is not shown on public content.
howToUse.privacyData: Your account data is protected. Only platform administrators can access identity for moderation, with audit logging.
howToUse.privacyGuidelines: Follow community guidelines: be respectful, avoid harassment, and report harmful content.

howPost.a: Sign in, tap Share, choose a mood category, write your message, and submit.

whoAmI.q: Can people know who I am?
whoAmI.a: No. Other students cannot see your name, email, or profile on public posts.

editPost.a: You can edit your own posts from the post detail view while signed in.

reactions.a: Tap a reaction on a post to express how it resonates with you. Reactions are anonymous.

landing.headline: Share how you feel — anonymously, safely, together.
landing.description: Mood of the Major helps students express emotional experience without revealing identity, while communities understand collective mood across faculties and majors.

anonymous.title: Anonymous posts
anonymous.body: Your voice matters. Your identity stays private in public views.

feeds.title: Faculty & major feeds
feeds.body: See how your academic community is feeling over time.

trust.title: Built for trust
trust.body: Security, moderation, and privacy are core — not add-ons.

landing.authLiveBody: Create an account to access your feed — browse anonymous moods or share your own.

feed.title: Mood feed
feed.description: Anonymous posts from students across campus.
feed.emptyBody: Be the first to share how you're feeling today.

facultyFeed.notFoundDescription: This faculty does not exist or is inactive.
facultyFeed.emptyTitle: No moods in this faculty yet
facultyFeed.emptyDescription: Check back later or share your own.

majorFeed.notFoundDescription: This major does not exist or is inactive.
majorFeed.emptyTitle: No moods in this major yet
majorFeed.emptyDescription: Check back later or share your own.

moodDetail.notFoundDescription: This post may have been removed or does not exist.
moodDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this mood? This cannot be undone.

moodForm.contentPlaceholder: Share anonymously how you're feeling today...

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to respond.

reportModal.title: Report content
reportModal.description: Help keep the community safe. Reports are anonymous.

charts.insufficientDataDescription: Aggregated statistics are hidden when group sizes are too small to protect anonymity.
charts.noDistributionData: No distribution data for this scope.
charts.noTimeSeriesData: No time-series data for this period.

search.title: Search
search.description: Find posts by keyword and filters (min 2 characters). Results update as you type.
search.minCharsHint: Enter at least 2 characters to search.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Aggregated mood insights — individual posts are never shown.
statistics.selectScopeHint: Select a scope to view statistics.

dashboard.description: Community mood insights and trending emotions — never individual identities.
dashboard.trendingDescription: Rising and shifting themes in the selected window.

trending.title: Trending
trending.description: Rising themes from recent activity — no individual posts are shown.
trending.selectScopeHint: Select a scope to view trending emotions.
trending.emptyDescription: Run the statistics aggregation job after mood activity builds up.

create.title: Share a mood
create.pageDescription: Your post will be anonymous. Only you know it's yours.

bookmarks.title: Saved moods
bookmarks.emptyDescription: Bookmark posts from the mood detail page.

submissions.description: Community suggestions are reviewed by administrators before being added.
submissions.loginRequired: Sign in to suggest a new faculty, major, or emotion tag.
submissions.selectFacultyFirst: Select a faculty before suggesting a major.

success.tag: Emotion tag suggestion submitted for review.

admin.postsDescription: All mood posts on the platform.
admin.noFacultiesDescription: No faculties have been approved yet.
admin.noMajorsDescription: No majors have been approved yet.
admin.moodTagsDescription: Approved emotion tags for mood posts.
admin.noMoodTagsDescription: No emotion tags have been approved yet.
